label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The user is asking if following these instructions will bring them back to the starting point. The instructions are: Turn left. Turn left. Take 10 steps. Take 6 steps. Turn left. Take 3 steps. Take 3 steps. And the options are yes or no. First, I need to visualize the path. Let me start by assuming the person is facing a certain direction, maybe north for simplicity. When you turn left, your direction changes. So if you start facing north and turn left once, you're facing west. Then turn left again, you're facing south. So after two left turns, you're facing south. Now, take 10 steps. Since they're facing south, moving south 10 steps. Then take 6 steps in the same direction (still south). So total of 16 steps south so far. Then they turn left again.
